title: FinTrack
category: Personal finance tracker with AI analysis
summary: A personal finance tracker that turns transaction data into clear spending patterns and practical AI-assisted insights.
details: Built transaction categorization flows with editable rules and confidence states.
Added monthly budget comparison, account snapshots, and recurring-spend detection.
Designed AI insight cards that explain what changed without overwhelming the dashboard.
Added AI-assisted analysis of transaction data with practical spending guidance.

title: Relay
summary: A focused messaging workspace with live conversations, channel presence, media sharing, and a calm interface for fast-moving teams.
details: Built a channel-based workspace for focused team conversations.
Added real-time messaging and presence with WebSockets.
Designed media sharing and a calm interface for day-to-day collaboration.

title: PropIQ
summary: Egyptian property market intelligence that collects listings, analyzes price trends, and generates AI-assisted market insights.
details: Collects property listings with price, area, location, and bedroom data.
Supports filtering by location, price range, and property type.
Uses APScheduler to run the scraper automatically every 24 hours.
Generates AI-assisted insights from real data, including trends and average price per square meter.

title: AI Job Application Assistant
summary: A backend API that helps job seekers analyze roles and prepare tailored application materials.
details: Supports secure multi-user accounts with JWT authentication.
Analyzes job descriptions and company websites to prepare application context.
Generates a tailored three-paragraph cover letter for each application.
Creates a custom CV summary for a specific role and company.
Provides five targeted interview tips based on job requirements.
